# markdown-to-jira


Skill para crear issues de tipo epic y/o task en Jira Cloud a partir de un archivo Markdown y luego completar componentes, labels y issue keys.



## Triggers

- Usa el skill `markdown-to-jira`

- Crea en Jira las issues descritas en este markdown

- Sincroniza este backlog markdown con Jira




## What I do

- Read the Markdown file and identify Epic/Task blocks

- Validate metadata (projectKey, issueType, summary, component, labels)

- Create Epic first if present, then Tasks

- Apply labels and components via jira_editJiraIssue

- Update Markdown with real issue keys and parentEpic




## Usage examples

- Create Jira issues from a structured Markdown document

- Convert markdown backlog to Jira epics and tasks
